description: Create an HVAC ductwork plan for a server room in Wondershare EdrawMax. The diagram must feature a rectangular room containing an Air Handling Unit (AHU) labeled "AHU-1", two Supply Diffusers connected to the AHU with the duct path labeled "Supply Air", and one Return Grille labeled "Return Air". Save the project to ~/Documents/server_room_hvac.eddx and export the diagram as an image to ~/Documents/server_room_hvac.png.
